data_root: 中美投入产出表数据（附表格阅读说明）
total_csv: 中美投入产出表数据（附表格阅读说明）/美国/OECD美国投入产出数据/投入产出，行业-行业，total口径/USA2017ttl.csv
domestic_csv: 中美投入产出表数据（附表格阅读说明）/美国/OECD美国投入产出数据/投入产出（含进口行），行业-行业，Domestic口径/USA2017dom.csv

notes.factor_params: w=LaborIncome/L, r=external, K=CapitalIncome/r, L=external labor population
notes.P_j: Endogenous mode: solved from static equilibrium system; exogenous mode: from external JSON
notes.P_j_O: Endogenous mode: implied import prices from equilibrium; exogenous mode: from external JSON
notes.E_j: Baseline export quantity E_j = ExportValue_j / P_j
notes.status: Enhanced B-class implementation with endogenous price calibration and exogenous fallback
